section1.title: Company Overview

aboutHanli.title: About Hanli
aboutHanli.description1: We leverage the unique industry-university-research consortium of Chaowei Group and Wuhan University of Technology, dedicated to providing the world's leading new energy marine power system solutions for inland and coastal vessels, covering pure electric, hybrid power, and multi-fuel clean propulsion technologies including methanol, ammonia, and hydrogen.
aboutHanli.description2: Hanli New Energy focuses on providing green, efficient, and sustainable power solutions for inland and coastal shipping, covering green marine power system integration, multi-fuel hybrid engine R&D, multi-fuel supply systems, and ship energy storage systems. The company has the capability to adapt engines to diverse clean fuels such as methanol, ammonia, and hydrogen, driving a smooth transition of marine power from traditional fuels to low-carbon and zero-carbon energy.

features.title: Clear Strategic Positioning
features.description: Focused on the green transformation of inland and coastal vessels, committed to becoming a leading global provider of comprehensive new energy marine power system solutions.

features.title: Clean Fuel Adaptation
features.description: Capable of adapting engines to diverse low-carbon/zero-carbon clean fuels such as methanol, ammonia, and hydrogen, driving a smooth transition from traditional fuels to green energy.

features.title: Policy Alignment
features.description: Deeply responsive to dual-carbon goals and national green shipping policies, helping customers meet increasingly stringent environmental regulations.

features.title: Strong Backing
features.description: Jointly invested and supported by Hong Kong-listed Chaowei Group and Wuhan University of Technology, integrating industrial resources and research expertise.

features.title: Elite Team Configuration
features.description: Core R&D led by the School of Naval Architecture, Ocean and Energy Power Engineering at Wuhan University of Technology, bringing together senior technical experts from international leaders like Rolls-Royce and Wärtsilä.

features.title: Comprehensive R&D System
features.description: Building a complete R&D architecture covering the entire marine power system lifecycle, combining international technical vision with localized implementation capabilities.

features.title: Full-Stack Product Coverage
features.description: Business encompasses green marine power system integration, multi-fuel hybrid engine R&D, multi-fuel supply systems, ship energy storage systems and other key areas.

features.title: Customized Solutions
features.description: Through modular and integrated design, providing personalized, high-performance, and highly reliable solutions tailored to different vessel types and operational scenarios.

features.title: Full-Lifecycle Empowerment
features.description: Providing end-to-end services from R&D, integration, and adaptation to subsequent support, helping vessel owners and builders complete their green transformation seamlessly.

solutionsSection.title: Solutions
solutionsSection.subtitle: Hanli New Energy Breaks Through the Complex Challenges of Green Marine Propulsion
solutionsSection.tagline: Hanli New Energy: Innovation Driving Green Revolution.

solutions.title: Electric Direct Drive System
solutions.description: Providing zero-emission solutions for inland, lake, and coastal vessels. Core components include high-performance permanent magnet synchronous motors, high-density energy storage systems, DC power distribution, and intelligent propulsion control systems.

solutions.title: Hybrid Power System
solutions.description: For vessels requiring long range and high power, intelligently coupling engines, generators, energy storage systems, and propulsion motors. Supports multiple operating modes (pure electric, generator direct drive, combined drive, smart charging).

solutions.title: Marine Energy Storage System
solutions.description: Marine energy storage system, derived from Chaowei Group's leading battery technology and cutting-edge research from Wuhan University of Technology, built specifically for harsh marine environments and diverse power scenarios. We provide high-safety, long-lifespan, multi-protection energy storage solutions that serve as the reliable foundation for pure electric navigation, hybrid power, and future zero-carbon fuel systems.

solutions.title: New Energy Fuel Supply System
solutions.description: Targeting alcohol, ammonia, and hydrogen clean fuel power systems, paving the way for zero-carbon emissions. Our integrated capabilities ensure each solution is highly reliable, scenario-appropriate, and optimized for total lifecycle cost.

productIntroCard.title: Hybrid Power System
productIntroCard.description: For vessels requiring long range and high power, intelligently coupling engines, generators, energy storage systems, and propulsion motors. Supports multiple operating modes (pure electric, generator direct drive, combined drive, smart charging).

electricDirectDrive.title:
Electric Direct Drive System
Solutions
electricDirectDrive.description: Providing zero-emission solutions for inland, lake, and coastal vessels. Core components include high-performance permanent magnet synchronous motors, high-density energy storage systems, DC power distribution, and intelligent propulsion control systems.

hybridPower.title:
Hybrid Power System
Solutions
hybridPower.description: For vessels requiring long range and high power, intelligently coupling engines, generators, energy storage systems, and propulsion motors. Supports multiple operating modes (pure electric, generator direct drive, combined drive, smart charging).

shipEnergyStorage.title:
Marine Energy Storage System
Product Series
shipEnergyStorage.description: Optical Energy Storage and Charging Intelligent System (Marine Energy Storage System), derived from Chaowei Group's leading battery technology and cutting-edge research from Wuhan University of Technology, built specifically for harsh marine environments and diverse power scenarios. We provide high-safety, long-lifespan, multi-protection energy storage solutions that serve as the reliable foundation for pure electric navigation, hybrid power, and future zero-carbon fuel systems.

hydrogenFuelSystem.title:
Hydrogen Fuel System
Product Series
hydrogenFuelSystem.description: This system pioneered flexible hydrogen liquefaction technology, abandoning traditional turbine expansion cycles and adopting independently developed high-power low-temperature refrigeration units. Production capacity can be dynamically adjusted between 20%-100%, enabling rapid liquid startup. Modular design results in compact equipment with flexible parallel expansion capabilities and high reliability redundancy. Core components include hydrogen liquefaction units, liquid nitrogen precooling units, refrigeration compressors, and liquid hydrogen storage tanks.

methanolFuelSystem.title:
Methanol Fuel System
Product Series
methanolFuelSystem.description: The methanol fuel system mainly consists of methanol loading units, methanol barge units, and methanol supply units as key modules. Additionally, it includes inert gas systems, air instrument systems, methanol emission systems, ventilation systems, and control monitoring & safety systems as subsystems. Through the coordination of various systems, it achieves safe storage and efficient supply of methanol fuel.
